sniside-dashboards.title: SNI-SIDE — National Intelligence Overview
sniside-dashboards.description: Tableau de bord principal de l'intelligence nationale SNI-SIDE

panels.title: Alertes en Temps Réel par Séverité
panels.query: SELECT severity, count() FROM sniside.alerts_stream WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY severity

panels.title: ALPR — Lectures par Minute
panels.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(read_timestamp) AS t, count() FROM sniside.alpr_stream WHERE read_timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Top 10 Plaques Recherchées
panels.query: SELECT plate_text, count() AS hits, countDistinct(camera_code) AS cameras FROM sniside.alpr_stream WHERE is_wanted = 1 AND read_timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY plate_text ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: Frontières — Entrées/Sorties Aujourd'hui
panels.query: SELECT crossing_direction, count() FROM sniside.border_crossings_analytics WHERE toDate(crossing_date) = today() GROUP BY crossing_direction

panels.title: Transactions Suspectes — Risque Élevé
panels.query: SELECT transaction_ref, amount_usd, source_country, risk_score FROM sniside.suspicious_transactions WHERE risk_score > 0.8 AND transaction_date > now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Cyber IOCs par Séverité (24h)
panels.query: SELECT severity, count() FROM sniside.cyber_ioc_stream WHERE last_seen > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY severity

panels.title: Performance Moteur de Recherche
panels.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(created_at) AS t, avg(search_duration_ms) AS avg_ms, quantile(0.99)(search_duration_ms) AS p99 FROM sniside.search_log WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY t ORDER BY t

panels.title: Taux de Résolution Criminelle
panels.query: SELECT department, if(solved_cases > 0, round(solved_cases/total_cases*100, 1), 0) AS resolution_rate FROM sniside.crime_statistics WHERE date = yesterday() ORDER BY resolution_rate DESC

panels.title: État de Santé des Modèles IA
panels.query: SELECT model_name, model_version, avg(avg_latency_ms) AS latency, sum(error_count) AS errors, avg(gpu_utilization) AS gpu FROM sniside.ai_model_performance WHERE observation_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY model_name, model_version

panels.title: Évolution du Graphe Intelligence
panels.query: SELECT snapshot_date, node_count, edge_count, detected_networks FROM sniside.graph_evolution ORDER BY snapshot_date

sniside-dashboards.title: SNI-SIDE — Real Time Crime Center (RTCC)
sniside-dashboards.description: Centre de réponse immédiate — temps réel

panels.title: Alertes Critiques en Direct
panels.query: SELECT alert_type, severity, title, created_at FROM sniside.alerts_stream WHERE severity IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH') AND status = 'NEW' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: ALPR — Véhicules Recherchés Détectés
panels.query: SELECT plate_text, camera_code, department, read_timestamp FROM sniside.alpr_hits WHERE read_timestamp > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY read_timestamp DESC

panels.title: Carte des Incidents (24h)
panels.query: SELECT latitude, longitude, alert_type, severity FROM sniside.alerts_stream WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR AND latitude IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Frontières — Watchlist Hits
panels.query: SELECT countIf(alert_triggered = 1) AS watchlist_hits FROM sniside.border_crossings_analytics WHERE crossing_date > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR

panels.title: Transactions AML — Alertes Récentes
panels.query: SELECT transaction_ref, amount_usd, sender_name, destination_country, risk_score FROM sniside.suspicious_transactions WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND risk_score > 0.7 AND transaction_date > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR ORDER BY risk_score DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Personnes Recherchées — Vue Combinée
panels.query: SELECT wp.niu, wp.full_name, wp.risk_level, count(aw.warrant_id) AS warrants FROM snisid_ncid.wanted_persons wp LEFT JOIN snisid_ncid.arrest_warrants aw ON wp.niu = aw.person_niu AND aw.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE wp.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY wp.niu, wp.full_name, wp.risk_level ORDER BY wp.risk_level DESC, warrants DESC LIMIT 50

sniside-dashboards.title: SNI-SIDE — AI Fusion Center Monitor
sniside-dashboards.description: Surveillance des modèles IA et du GraphRAG

panels.title: Inférence IA par Modèle (req/min)
panels.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(observation_time) AS t, model_name, sum(inference_count) AS count FROM sniside.ai_model_performance WHERE observation_time > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY t, model_name

panels.title: Latence P99 par Modèle
panels.query: SELECT observation_time AS t, model_name, p99_latency_ms FROM sniside.ai_model_performance WHERE observation_time > now() - INTERVAL 6 HOUR

panels.title: Taux d'Erreur Modèles IA
panels.query: SELECT toStartOfHour(observation_time) AS t, model_name, avg(error_rate)*100 AS error_pct FROM sniside.ai_model_performance WHERE observation_time > now() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR GROUP BY t, model_name

panels.title: GraphRAG — Requêtes Traitées
panels.query: SELECT count() AS queries FROM sniside.search_log WHERE graph_context_used = 1 AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR

panels.title: GPU Utilization
panels.query: SELECT model_name, avg(gpu_utilization) AS gpu_pct FROM sniside.ai_model_performance WHERE observation_time > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE GROUP BY model_name

sniside-dashboards.title: SNI-SIDE — Fusion Center National
sniside-dashboards.description: Centre de fusion du renseignement — vue consolidée

panels.title: Personnes Recherchées
panels.query: SELECT count(*) FROM snisid_ncid.wanted_persons WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'

panels.title: Alertes Actives (non traitées)
panels.query: SELECT count(*) FROM sniside.alerts_stream WHERE status = 'NEW'

panels.title: ADN Profiles (CODIS)
panels.query: SELECT count(*) FROM snisid_codis.dna_profiles WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'

panels.title: ALPR Lectures Aujourd'hui
panels.query: SELECT count(*) FROM sniside.alpr_stream WHERE toDate(read_timestamp) = today()

panels.title: Carte des Hotspots Criminels
panels.query: SELECT h.location[0] AS lat, h.location[1] AS lng, h.hotspot_type, h.risk_level FROM snisid_geoint.hotspots h WHERE h.status = 'ACTIVE'

panels.title: Corrélations Inter-Bases
panels.query: SELECT entity_id, entity_type, arrayStringConcat(databases_present, ', ') AS databases, total_references, avg_risk_score FROM sniside.entity_correlations WHERE total_references > 2 ORDER BY total_references DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Tendances Criminelles par Département
panels.query: SELECT date, department, total_cases FROM sniside.crime_statistics WHERE date > now() - INTERVAL 90 DAY ORDER BY date

panels.title: Réseaux Financiers Détectés
panels.query: SELECT transaction_ref, amount_usd, sender_name, beneficiary_name, risk_score, mlro_filed FROM sniside.suspicious_transactions WHERE risk_score > 0.9 AND transaction_date > now() - INTERVAL 30 DAY ORDER BY risk_score DESC, amount_usd DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Route de Trafic — Top Origines
panels.query: SELECT origin_country, count(*) AS cnt FROM snisid_narcotics.narcotics_routes WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY origin_country ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10
